summary: Reviewed and updated the unfinished DinoBrain OS improvement plan, implemented P0-04 direct MCP proof ingestion and regression verifier, wired direct MCP parity into verify:goal, recorded a current Codex direct MCP proof plus Claude not_configured artifact, and pushed app/data commits. Overall OS completion remains partial because live Codex pre-response proof, full-memory audit drift, and task lifecycle repair still block verify:goal.
decisions: Direct MCP parity must be based on real client proof artifacts under .dino/proofs/client-mcp, not config, hook, bootstrap, CLI fallback, alias discovery, stale proof, or partial tool evidence.
Valid Claude absence is represented as not_configured with evidence and warning rather than silent success.
Proof JSON reader strips UTF-8 BOM because Windows PowerShell may emit BOM-bearing JSON artifacts.
The strict ten-reviewer consensus document remains pending because final roles 5-10 previously returned empty subagent outputs and were not counted as agreement.
next_steps: Implement P0-05 native instruction authority gate and verifier.
Repair remaining verify:goal blockers: live Codex pre-response proof, full-memory audit drift, and task lifecycle finish-gate repair.
Rerun a clean ten-reviewer final AGREE round once the subagent tool returns complete outputs.
Wire P0/P1 blockers into Observatory API/UI lanes in P1-11.
